SgDiscardDigit.name: stackDepth

SgDiscardDigit.name: totalNumberPages
SgDiscardDigit.description: Total de paginas do monte. Quando definido, a pilha visual encolhe a cada increasePage().

SgDiscardDigit.name: value
SgDiscardDigit.description: Texto/valor exibido na folha do topo.

SgMatrixDigit.description: Add a subtle glow around active dots.

Text to render using matrix dots.

SgMultiSelect.description: Quantos rotulos exibir antes de cair no resumo "N selecionadas".

SgNeonDigit.name: font
SgNeonDigit.description: Font family alias (same effect as fontFamily).

SgNeonDigit.name: shadowStrength
SgNeonDigit.description: Extra intensity factor for the glow effect.

SgNeonDigit.name: transitionMs
SgNeonDigit.description: Total animation time in milliseconds when value changes.

SgPeriodSelector.name: allowCustomPeriod
SgPeriodSelector.description: Habilita a opcao "Periodo" (intervalo customizado). Default true.

SgPeriodSelector.name: locale
SgPeriodSelector.description: Locale para labels e formatacao. Default "pt-BR".

SgPeriodSelector.name: permitAll
SgPeriodSelector.description: Habilita a opcao "Todos" (sem limites de data). Default true.

SgPeriodSelector.name: permitCurrent
SgPeriodSelector.description: Habilita o grupo de periodos atuais (THIS_*, TODAY, YESTERDAY). Default true.

SgPeriodSelector.name: permitFuture
SgPeriodSelector.description: Habilita o grupo de periodos futuros (TOMORROW, NEXT_*). Default true.

SgPeriodSelector.name: permitPast
SgPeriodSelector.description: Habilita o grupo de periodos passados (LAST_*). Default true.

SgPeriodSelector.name: referenceDate
SgPeriodSelector.description: Data de referencia para resolver os presets (default: agora). Util em testes.

SgRadialGauge.type: ((pointerId: string, value: number, pointer: SgRadialGaugePointer) => void)

SgRoller3DDigit.name: fontSize
SgRoller3DDigit.description: Font size in pixels â€” controls overall scale

SgRoller3DDigit.name: items
SgRoller3DDigit.description:
Ordered list of all possible values this roller can show.
The drum scrolls to the position of `value` in this list.

SgRoller3DDigit.name: value
SgRoller3DDigit.description: Current value to display â€” must be present in `items`

SgSegmentDigit.name: value
SgSegmentDigit.description: Character rendered by the component (first character is used).

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: backgroundColor
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Background color of the component panel.

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: glow
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Enables glow effect on active segments.

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: palette
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Preset visual palette for active, inactive and background colors.

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: rounded
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Border radius of the panel in pixels.

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: skew
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Applies a subtle skew to mimic classic LED displays.

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: value
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Character rendered by the component (first character is used).

SgSevenSegmentDigit.name: width
SgSevenSegmentDigit.description: Component width in pixels. By default, derived from `size`.

SgStringAnimator.name: alignTo
SgStringAnimator.description:
Alinhamento das strings:
- "left"  — preenche a direita com emptyChar (ideal para texto/nomes)
- "right" — preenche a esquerda com emptyChar (ideal para numeros)

SgStringAnimator.name: autoStart
SgStringAnimator.description:
Se true, inicia a animacao automaticamente quando o componente
monta e sempre que targetString mudar.

SgStringAnimator.name: backgroundColor
SgStringAnimator.description: Cor de fundo — aplicada nos estilos "neon", "fade", "discard" e "matrix".

SgStringAnimator.name: charset
SgStringAnimator.description:
Conjunto de caracteres validos para o SgRoller3DDigit.
Deve conter todos os caracteres que podem aparecer em sourceString,
targetString e emptyChar. Ignorado quando style != "roller3d".

SgStringAnimator.name: color
SgStringAnimator.description:
Cor principal do texto/ponto — aplicada nos estilos "neon", "fade",
"discard" e "matrix".

SgStringAnimator.name: emptyChar
SgStringAnimator.description:
Caractere utilizado para preencher as posicoes extras quando
sourceString e targetString possuem comprimentos diferentes.

SgStringAnimator.name: fontSize
SgStringAnimator.description: Tamanho da fonte em pixels — controla a escala de cada digito.

SgStringAnimator.name: stringAnimatorStyle
SgStringAnimator.description:
Estilo de animacao por caractere.
- "roller3d": tambor vertical (SgRoller3DDigit)
- "flip": vira o card (SgFlipDigit)
- "neon": brilho neon com fade (SgNeonDigit)
- "fade": apaga e acende (SgFadeDigit)
- "discard": folha descartada voando (SgDiscardDigit)
- "matrix": pontos em matriz LED (SgMatrixDigit)

SgStringAnimator.name: targetString
SgStringAnimator.description: String de destino — o componente anima ate ela

SgStringAnimator.name: velocity
SgStringAnimator.description:
Velocidade de 1 (muito lento) a 100 (muito rapido).
Controla o intervalo de tempo entre a troca de cada caractere.

SgToastHost.name: rounded
SgToastHost.description: Arredonda os cantos de cada toast (rounded-md). Desligue para cantos retos.

SgToaster.name: rounded
SgToaster.description: Arredonda os cantos de cada toast (rounded-md). Desligue para cantos retos.

SgWhistleHost.name: rounded
SgWhistleHost.description: Arredonda os cantos de cada whistle (rounded-lg). Desligue para cantos retos.

SgWhistler.name: rounded
SgWhistler.description: Arredonda os cantos de cada whistle (rounded-lg). Desligue para cantos retos.
